meta.name_vi: Toán tử Tiến hóa Có Kỷ luật cho Hệ Vi phân Bậc hai
meta.name_en: Disciplined Evolution Operator for Second-Order Differential Systems
meta.author: Phan Thành Trung (Trung Bờm) × GPT
meta.summary_vi: DEO-2 v1.1 runtime triển khai pipeline Π · exp(Δt·Λ) · Π cho hệ vi phân bậc hai dạng X=(y,v), gồm cắt miền khả thi, chuẩn hóa height-zero, tiến hóa bằng expm2x2 và kiểm tra bất biến.
meta.summary_en: DEO-2 v1.1 runtime implements the Π · exp(Δt·Λ) · Π pipeline for second-order systems in X=(y,v) form, including feasible projection, height-zero normalization, expm2x2 evolution, and invariant checks.

definition.statement_ascii: D_DEO-2(T) = lim(n->infty) product_k [ Pi(t_k) * exp(delta_t_k * Lambda(t_k)) * Pi(t_k) ]
definition.statement_unicode: D_DEO-2(T) = limₙ→∞ Πₖ [ Π(tₖ) · exp(Δtₖ · Λ(tₖ)) · Π(tₖ) ]
definition.runtime_approximation: Finite partition with n_steps; each step applies OP_CUT → OP_BRAUER0 → OP_EVOLVE → OP_CUT.

dynamics.scalar_second_order: y″ = a(t)y + b(t)y′ + force(t), converted to A=[[0,1],[a,b]]
dynamics.opaque: metadata only; must be converted to matrix2x2 before runtime evolution

operators.purpose_vi: Cắt miền khả thi bằng clamp bounds và reject NaN/Inf.
operators.purpose_en: Feasible-domain projection through bounds clamp and NaN/Inf rejection.

operators.purpose_vi: Chuẩn hóa A(t) thành Λ(t) 2x2 canonical; zero nhỏ, clamp lớn, trace height.
operators.purpose_en: Normalize A(t) into canonical 2x2 Λ(t); zero tiny entries, clamp large entries, trace height.

operators.purpose_vi: Tính X_{k+1}=exp(Δt·Λ)X_k với matrix exponential 2x2 thật.
operators.purpose_en: Compute X_{k+1}=exp(Δt·Λ)X_k using a real analytic 2x2 matrix exponential.

silicon.notes: Operator-locked runtime pipeline. No backprop/gradient required.

demo.result_note: The expm2x2 kernel should match the analytic oscillator solution up to floating-point error.

classification_after_upgrade.before: Meta-Epic Candidate / Silicon Evolution Pipeline Candidate
classification_after_upgrade.after: Epic Core Candidate / Runtime Evolution Operator
classification_after_upgrade.reason: The runtime now performs actual feasible projection, canonical normalization, expm2x2 evolution, invariant checking, and trajectory simulation.
